section_name: Fees for Military Specialty License Plates
text:
(a) A person applying for a set of license plates under this subchapter shall pay the registration fee required under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) and the applicable special plate fee required under this section, except that one set of license plates shall be issued without the payment of the registration fee under:

(1) Section 504.308 (Distinguished Flying Cross Medal Recipients) ;

(2) Section 504.310 (World War Ii Veterans and Certain Medal Recipients) (b);

(3) Section 504.315 (Military Specialty License Plates for Extraordinary Service) , other than Subsections (c) and (q) of that section; and

(4) Section 504.319 (Defense Superior Service Medal Recipients) .

(b) The fee for the issuance of one set of specialty license plates issued under Section 504.315 (Military Specialty License Plates for Extraordinary Service) (d) or (g) is $3. There is no additional fee for a specialty license plate issued under another provision of this subchapter.

(c) A surviving spouse applying for a set of license plates under Section 504.302 (Surviving Spouses of Certain Military Veterans) shall pay the fees required for the type of license plate for which the surviving spouse is eligible.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.3015 — Fees for Military Specialty License Plates

(a) A person applying for a set of license plates under this subchapter shall pay the registration fee required under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) and the applicable special plate fee required under this section, except that one set of license plates shall be issued without the payment of the registration fee under:

    (1) Section 504.308 (Distinguished Flying Cross Medal Recipients) ;

    (2) Section 504.310 (World War Ii Veterans and Certain Medal Recipients) (b);

    (3) Section 504.315 (Military Specialty License Plates for Extraordinary Service) , other than Subsections (c) and (q) of that section; and

    (4) Section 504.319 (Defense Superior Service Medal Recipients) .

(b) The fee for the issuance of one set of specialty license plates issued under Section 504.315 (Military Specialty License Plates for Extraordinary Service) (d) or (g) is $3. There is no additional fee for a specialty license plate issued under another provision of this subchapter.

(c) A surviving spouse applying for a set of license plates under Section 504.302 (Surviving Spouses of Certain Military Veterans) shall pay the fees required for the type of license plate for which the surviving spouse is eligible.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 67 (S.B.225), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2019.*

Section 504.310 (World War Ii Veterans and Certain Medal Recipients) (b);
Section 504.315 (Military Specialty License Plates for Extraordinary Service) , other than Subsections (c) and (q) of that section; and

subsections.text: A surviving spouse applying for a set of license plates under Section 504.302 (Surviving Spouses of Certain Military Veterans) shall pay the fees required for the type of license plate for which the surviving spouse is eligible.
